name: grub2_and_not_osbuild_and_system_with_kernel
original_expression: grub2 and system_with_kernel and not osbuild
xml_content: <ns0:platform xmlns:ns0="http://cpe.mitre.org/language/2.0" id="grub2_and_not_osbuild_and_system_with_kernel"><ns0:logical-test operator="AND" negate="false"><ns0:logical-test operator="AND" negate="true"><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-installed_env_is_osbuild:def:1" /></ns0:logical-test><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-installed_env_has_grub2_package:def:1" /><ns0:check-fact-ref system="http://oval.mitre.org/XMLSchema/oval-definitions-5" href="ssg-rhel9-cpe-oval.xml" id-ref="oval:ssg-system_with_kernel:def:1" /></ns0:logical-test></ns0:platform>
ansible_conditional: ( "grub2-common" in ansible_facts.packages and not ( lookup("env", "container") == "bwrap-osbuild" ) and "kernel-core" in ansible_facts.packages )
